original.description: Zentralisierte Multi-Cloud-Governance über Multi Cloud Connectivity Platform und Future Cloud Infrastructure, mit strukturiertem FinOps-Maturity-Assessment, kontinuierlichem Cost Management und eingebetteten Compliance-Controls für BSI C5, GDPR und lokale Regulierung.

proposed.description: Structured FinOps practice spanning maturity assessment, cost-governance accelerators, and continuous FinOps-as-a-Service across AWS, Azure, and GCP using Flexera and Apptio tooling.

evidence.excerpt: FinOps Maturity Assessment in Light and Deep-dive options. FinOps Accelerators enhance cost governance. FinOps as a Service (FaaS) ensures continuous management, cost control, and transparency.
Assessment structured into four phases: Knowledge and process, Cost optimization, Automation, and Governance. Partnerships with Flexera and Apptio for tooling.

notes: Narrowed scope to FinOps only, removing multi-cloud governance (which overlaps with hybrid-cloud feature's MCCP and governance framework). The original bundled two independent capabilities: multi-cloud governance and FinOps cost management. Multi-cloud governance is already covered by hybrid-cloud via MCCP. Renamed from 'Multi-Cloud & FinOps Management' to 'Cloud FinOps' to reflect the narrowed, MECE scope. Switched from German to English per portfolio.json language setting.
